notableEvents.label: José Ramírez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Chase DeLauter out at 2nd. José Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez grounds out, first baseman Alec Burleson to pitcher Justin Bruihl.
